sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n819" key="a)greiosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγρειοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n819.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clownishness</tr_>: or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a rude, vagrant life,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
